name: Jordan Marsh Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter, sugar, and eggs.
3. Sift dry ingredients together and add alternately with milk and vanilla to the creamed mixture.
4. Fold berries into the batter and spoon into greased muffin pan.
5. Sprinkle with sugar and bake 30 minutes.
